memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Edward Despencer (died 1342)
memoryArtifacts.description: Edward le Despenser (died 1342) was a son of Hugh le Despenser the Younger by his wife Eleanor de Clare.[1][2] His father, a favourite of Edward II of England, was executed in 1326. Through his mother …

popularStory.description: During the Second Barons' War of 1264–67, William Maudit, 8th Earl of Warwick, was a supporter of King Henry III. The castle was taken in a surprise attack by the forces of Simon de Montfort, 6th Earl …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Despenser I於1310年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Sir Hugh le Despenser 1st Lord Despenser24歲，母親Eleanor de Clare18歲。他於1335年4月20日與Anne Ferrers在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1342年登記服兵役。他去世於1342年9月30日在法國布列塔尼莫萊可享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Despenser I于1310年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，他的父亲Sir Hugh le Despenser 1st Lord Despenser24岁，母亲Eleanor de Clare18岁。他于1335年4月20日与Anne Ferrers在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1342年登记服兵役。他去世于1342年9月30日在法国布列塔尼莫萊可享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Despenser I was born in 1310, in Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Hugh le Despenser 1st Lord Despenser, was 24 and his mother, Eleanor de Clare, was 18. He married Anne Ferrers on 20 April 1335, in Groby, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He registered for military service in 1342. He died on 30 September 1342, in Morlaix, Brittany, France, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Despenser I est né en 1310, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh le Despenser 1st Lord Despenser, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Clare, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Anne Ferrers le 20 avril 1335, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1342. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1342, à Morlaix, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.Stoke, Gloucestershire, England: Stoke Bishop, Bristol, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Despenser I 1310 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh le Despenser 1st Lord Despenser 24 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Clare 18. Er hat am 20. April 1335 in Groby, Leicestershire, England Anne Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er hat sich 1342 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 30. September 1342 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Morlaix, Bretagne, Frankreich.

Lui sposato Anne Ferrers il 20 aprile 1335, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1342. Morì il 30 settembre 1342, nel Morlaix, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Despenser Iが1310年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh le Despenser 1st Lord Despenserは24歳，母Eleanor de Clareは18歳であった。1335年4月20日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーでAnne Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1342年に兵役登録をした。彼は1342年9月30日にフランスブレタグンモーレイックスで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Despenser I(이)가 1310년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh le Despenser 1st Lord Despenser(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Clare(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1335년 4월 20일 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 Anne Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1342년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1342년 9월 30일 프랑스 브레타그니 모를레이스에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Despenser I nasceu em 1310, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh le Despenser 1st Lord Despenser, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Clare, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Ferrers em 20 de abril de 1335, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1342. Ele faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1342, em Morlaix, Bretagne, França, com 32 anos.

ro.Stoke, Gloucestershire, England: Stoke Bishop, Bristol, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Despenser I родился в 1310 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh le Despenser 1st Lord Despenser было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Clare, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Ferrers 20 апреля 1335 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1342 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 30 сентября 1342 г. в местности морлеикс, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 32 лет.

Se casó con Anne Ferrers el 20 de abril de 1335, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1342. Murió el 30 de septiembre de 1342, en Morlaix, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 32 años.
